# Fluentia Academy (أكاديمية طلاقة)

> Premium online English language academy for Arabic speakers, based in Saudi Arabia. Small-group classes (max 7 students), daily personal follow-up with native-level Saudi trainers, structured curriculum from A1 to C1, and IELTS preparation.

## About
Fluentia Academy is a private online English school founded by Dr. Ali Alahmad (د. علي الأحمد). We serve Arabic-speaking learners — primarily from Saudi Arabia — who want to reach genuine English fluency through structured, small-group instruction.

## Core Offerings
- Self-study access to the full smart platform (no live classes)
- Group classes (max 7 students per class, from 8 hours per month)
- Six CEFR-aligned levels (Pre-A1 → C1), 72 units, 15,000+ words
- IELTS preparation (within the development and 1-on-1 tracks)
- Daily trainer follow-up and correction
- Private 1-on-1 sessions (VIP tier)
- Custom LMS with AI-assisted speaking and pronunciation practice

## Packages (monthly, SAR)
- التعلم الذاتي (Self-Study, platform only): 500 SAR
- أساس (Foundation): 750 SAR
- طلاقة (Fluency, most popular): 1,200 SAR
- تميّز (Excellence): 1,500 SAR
- التدريب الفردي (1-on-1 VIP): 2,000–3,000 SAR (priced by intensity)

Every package starts with a free initial conversation with the trainer — no payment before you confirm it fits.

## Language
Primary language: Arabic (العربية). Full English translations available for About, Privacy, and Terms.
